summary: Comprehensive testing of Student Dashboard, Admin Panel, and Student APIs completed successfully. All 11 features tested and verified working correctly.

tests.description: Auth /api/auth/me with session cookie returns user data
/api/student/home returns upcoming_programs, financials, package, journey_logs, profile_status
Admin panel uses localStorage auth, not API
